name: Charlie's Wrap Sandwich
recipeIngredient: Sauteed Peppers (1/2 Yellow Pepper, 1/2 Orange Pepper)
1 Bunch Arugula Lettuce or Any Other Variety
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 tablespoon of extra virgin olive oil in a hot skillet. Add the sautéed peppers (1/2 yellow pepper and 1/2 orange pepper) until soft.
2. Remove from heat and sprinkle with 1 tablespoon of sherry vinegar.
3. Spread 2 tablespoons of goat cheese on flour tortillas or wraps. Scatter 1 tablespoon of chopped sun-dried tomatoes on the wrap. Divide the sautéed peppers on top of the tortilla, ensuring they are in the center.
4. Toss a bunch of arugula lettuce (or any other variety) with 2 tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil and 1/2 tablespoon of sherry vinegar. Place the tossed arugula in the center of the tortilla.
5. Fold about an inch of the tortilla from the top and bottom over the filling. Turn the wrap sideways and roll it up. Wrap in wax paper or tin foil.
6. Serve at room temperature.
